No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university elective (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to teach Spanish language skills (4.1, 4.4) and introduce Spanish/Latin American culture (4.7, cultural diversity). Model B's reasoning is more comprehensive.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes learning to 'Preguntar y decir la profesión' (ask and state profession), which provides a basic skill relevant to employment and economic participation (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a contribution to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By fostering cross-cultural understanding through language and cultural education, the course indirectly promotes social inclusion (Target 10.2) and reduces inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course explicitly introduces '西語系國家的文化(傳統、習俗、節慶...等)' and '西班牙與拉丁美洲的社會文化', directly supporting the safeguarding of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
